```text
<p>Models Available in This Release</p><p>Kling Video 3.0, Kling Video 3.0 Omni, Kling Image 3.0, Kling Image 3.0 Omni</p><p>Refer to <a href="https://docs.qingque.cn/d/home/eZQDkLsWj1-DlmBV0EQIOm9vu?identityId=2CFp2MveJ7c#section=h.f13f61edvoid" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">&lt;Kling AI Series 3.0 Model API Specification&gt;</a></p><div class="container"><ul><li><p>Key Highlights of the Models</p><p>3.0 All-in-One: A unified model for multi-modal input and output.</p><ul><li>Most powerful consistency across the universe: Subject consistency (supports cameo, subject with voice control, i2v + subject) and text consistency.</li><li>Narrative control at your fingertips: More freedom, precision, and control—up to 15 seconds long, video scene cuts, ultra-high-definition storyboards/images, custom seconds.</li><li>Upgraded native audio-visual output: Supports multiple speakers and languages (with accents).</li></ul></li><li><p>Kling Video 3.0</p><p>Compared to 2.6, expected improvements:</p><ul><li>Supports subject upload in I2V scenarios for enhanced consistency</li><li>Significant improvement in multi-character referencing, especially for three-person scenarios</li><li>Supports Japanese, Korean, and Spanish in addition to Chinese and English</li><li>Capable of generating certain dialects and accents</li><li>Better distinction and control over different types of audio (speech, sound effects, BGM)</li><li>Improved text retention in I2V scenarios</li><li>Supports scene transitions, with up to 6 shots and customizable storyboarding</li></ul><p><a href="https://app.klingai.com/global/quickstart/klingai-video-3-model-user-guide" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">User Guide -&gt;</a></p></li><li><p>Kling Video 3.0 Omni</p><p>Compared to O1, expected improvements:</p><ul><li>Native audio-visual synchronization</li><li>Supports video subject creation</li><li>Further improved consistency in reference-based tasks, especially for characters and products</li><li>Combined capabilities of reference + storyboarding + audio-visual sync significantly enhance usability</li><li>Supports scene transitions, with up to 6 shots</li><li>Extended generation duration up to 15 seconds</li></ul><p><a href="https://app.klingai.com/global/quickstart/klingai-video-3-omni-model-user-guide" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">User Guide -&gt;</a></p></li><li><p>Kling Image 3.0</p><ul><li>Highly consistent feature retention</li><li>Precise response to detail modifications</li><li>Accurate control over style and tone</li><li>Rich imaginative capabilities</li></ul><p><a href="https://app.klingai.com/global/quickstart/klingai-image-3-model-user-guide" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">User Guide -&gt;</a></p></li><li><p>Kling Image 3.0 Omni</p><ul><li>Enhanced narrative sense</li><li>New storyboard image set generation, retaining reference image features with scene relevance</li><li>Direct output of 2K/4K ultra-high-definition images</li><li>Further improved detail consistency <a href="https://app.klingai.com/global/quickstart/klingai-image-3-omni-user-guide" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">User Guide -&gt;</a></li></ul></li></ul></div><p><strong>Quick Notice: Kling 3.0 Motion Control is expected to be available after Chinese Spring Festival Holiday. Please stay tuned!</strong></p><p>Key capabilities will be upgraded:</p><p>✓ Significantly improved facial consistency for characters</p><p>✓ Ensured continuity and stability of lip-sync and facial expressions even in complex movements, multiple angles, or long-duration expression changes</p><p>✓ Further expanded the boundaries in film compositing, motion capture, and diverse entertainment scenarios</p><br><p>Thank you for your support and understanding!</p>
```
